creator: dvl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Fallout confirms my personal experience with build errors.

src/cxx_supportlib/StrIntTools/StrIntUtils.cpp:33:10: fatal error: 'utf8.h' file not found
#include <utf8.h>
         ^~~~~~~~
1 error generated.
rake aborted!
